short: Cutting churn by just 1.5 pts can add 14 months of runway to a $13.9K MRR bootstrapped SaaS. The math, not the hype, decides if you survive. https://saastools.corenk.com/articles/would-reduce-saas-churn-rate
title: Would These Churn Tactics Actually Reduce SaaS Churn Rate, or Just Burn Your Runway?
